info.title: NuGetCleaner
info.description:
Copyright © 2019-2022 SIL International
--api-key             The NuGet API key.
--dry-run             Lists the pre-release versions to unlist without
unlisting them.
--min                 Minimum version, not included in the versions to unlist
(i.e. min<x<max). Defaults to 0.
--max                 Maximum version, not included in the versions to unlist
(i.e. min<x<max). Defaults to the latest release. Set to
-1 to include pre-release versions that have a higher
version number than the latest release (i.e. min<x)
--help                Display this help screen.
--version             Display version information.
packageId (pos. 0)    Required. The NuGet package id.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Lists the pre-release versions to unlist without
unlisting them.

options.name: --min
options.description:
Minimum version, not included in the versions to unlist
(i.e. min<x<max). Defaults to 0.

options.name: --max
options.description:
Maximum version, not included in the versions to unlist
(i.e. min<x<max). Defaults to the latest release. Set to
version number than the latest release (i.e. min<x)
